string: RestoreAssist uses your camera to photograph moisture meters, thermo-hygrometers, and laser measures so readings can be automatically extracted into your inspection report.
RestoreAssist accesses your photo library to attach existing inspection photos to reports.
RestoreAssist saves inspection photos to your photo library.
RestoreAssist uses your location to tag inspection photos with the site address.
RestoreAssist pairs with Tramex, Delmhorst, and Testo meters via Bluetooth to capture readings directly into your report.
RestoreAssist pairs with Bluetooth moisture meters and environmental sensors.
